creation_time.description: Timestamp for when the dataset was initially created

effective_labels.description: Aggregated labels, including inherited and applied ones

etag.description: Unique identifier for dataset version changes

id.description: Resource ID for referencing the dataset in APIs and configurations

last_modified_time.description: Time of the most recent update to the dataset

self_link.description: Direct URL for interacting with the dataset via API

terraform_labels.description: Labels explicitly set within Terraform for resource organization
